repository.name: credit_risk_ml_platform
repository.description: Credit risk assessment ML platform for retail and corporate lending. Supports model development, validation, and bias testing across 5 data sources: SQL Server (core banking), MySQL (credit bureau), MongoDB (application documents), PostgreSQL (risk ratings), and S3 (training archives). Implements POPIA Section 71 automated decision-making safeguards, SARB model governance requirements, and SHAP/LIME explainability. Features 4 entities: Applicant, LoanFacility, CreditBureauProfile, and CollateralAsset. Manages 50+ risk features with TTLs from 1 hour to 90 days. All training data anonymized with differential privacy techniques. Model versioning tracked via MLflow integration. Bias monitoring across demographic groups mandatory per SARB fairness guidelines.

source_1.name: Core Banking SQL Server

dbType.name: SQL Server
dbType.defaultProcess: Submit Model Risk Governance request via ServiceNow
dbType.sparkPattern: MS JDBC driver with query banding for audit

source_1.description: Primary banking transactions, account history, and internal ratings for credit risk model training
source_1.accessProcess:
1. Model Risk Committee approval
2. POPIA Section 71 impact assessment for automated decisions
3. Information Officer sign-off
4. Read-only AlwaysOn replica with query audit

details.notes:
Debezium CDC enabled for feature freshness
POPIA: Financial data special category
SARB: Model input lineage tracked
Encryption: TDE + Always Encrypted for sensitive features
Retention: 7 years per National Credit Act

source_1.sparkPattern: MS JDBC driver with query banding for audit

columnSecurity.anonymizationMethod: k-anonymity with l-diversity for training sets

details.notes:

source_3.name: Document Store MongoDB

entity_1.name: Applicant
entity_1.description: Loan applicants with POPIA pseudonymization and demographic fairness monitoring

details.notes:
POPIA Section 11: Consent management
Demographic fields: Protected for bias testing
Pseudonymization: SHA-256 with salt
Fairness: Demographic parity tracked per SARB guidelines
Retention: Application decision + 5 years

entity_2.name: LoanFacility
entity_2.description: Loan facilities and credit products with risk parameters

details.notes:
Facility types: Retail, Corporate, SME
Risk parameters: PD, LGD, EAD linkage
Regulatory: Basel III/IV compliant
Aggregation: Exposure at default calculations

entity_3.name: CreditBureauProfile
entity_3.description: External credit bureau aggregated profiles with NCR compliance

details.notes:
NCR: Data retention and usage compliance
Aggregation: Payment history bands, not raw data
Refresh: Monthly bureau updates
Consent: Section 18 NCA checks

entity_4.name: CollateralAsset
entity_4.description: Secured lending collateral with valuation and LTV metrics

details.notes:
Asset types: Property, Vehicles, Equipment
Valuation: Automated + Manual
LTV: Dynamic calculation
Insurance: Coverage validation

fv_1.name: ApplicantRiskProfile
fv_1.description: Core applicant risk features with bias-mitigated demographics

features.name: age_band
features.description: Age range bucket derived from SA ID number. Binned to reduce PII exposure while retaining risk signal.
features.transformation: CASE WHEN age<25 THEN '18-24' WHEN age<35 THEN '25-34' WHEN age<50 THEN '35-49' ELSE '50+' END

features.name: employment_stability_index
features.description: Composite score 0-1 measuring employment continuity, sector stability, and income consistency over 24 months.

features.name: income_quintile
features.description: Income quintile band Q1-Q5 derived from gross monthly income. Binned to minimise PII in downstream models.

features.name: existing_exposure_band
features.description: Total credit exposure band across all active facilities at origination. Segments applicants by existing debt load.
features.transformation: CASE WHEN exposure<50000 THEN 'Low' WHEN exposure<200000 THEN 'Medium' WHEN exposure<500000 THEN 'High' ELSE 'Very High' END

features.name: payment_to_income_ratio
features.description: Ratio of total monthly debt obligations to gross monthly income. Key affordability indicator per NCA Section 81.

features.name: demographic_risk_score
features.description: SARB-compliant aggregated risk score from non-discriminatory indicators. SHAP explainability required for adverse action notices.

details.notes:
POPIA: Aggregated bands, no exact values
Bias testing: Demographic parity pre-deployment
Source: SQL Server + PostgreSQL
Anonymization: k=5 anonymity for training
Explainability: SHAP values logged per feature

fv_2.name: BureauHistoryAggregated
fv_2.description: Credit bureau history with NCR-compliant aggregation

features.name: adverse_listing_flag
features.description: Binary flag: any active adverse listing (judgment, sequestration, default) at bureau query date. Strong default predictor.
features.transformation: CASE WHEN adverse_count>0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

features.name: payment_history_score
features.description: Aggregate payment behaviour score 0-999 across all credit agreements over 24 months. Bureau-sourced, NCR-compliant.

features.name: enquiry_count_90d
features.description: Hard credit enquiries in the past 90 days. Elevated counts signal credit-seeking behaviour and elevated risk.

features.name: accounts_active_count
features.description: Total open credit accounts at time of application. Proxy for credit utilisation complexity.

features.name: worst_status_12m
features.description: Worst delinquency status across all accounts in 12 months. 0=Current 1=30dpd 2=60dpd 3=90+dpd 4=Default.
features.transformation: MAX(delinquency_code) OVER (PARTITION BY consumer_id ORDER BY statement_month ROWS BETWEEN 12 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

details.notes:
NCR: No granular payment history exposed
Aggregation: Buckets per NCR guidelines
Refresh: Monthly bureau updates
POPIA: Section 18 NCA consent verified
Bias: Disparate impact testing mandatory

fv_3.name: FacilityRiskMetrics
fv_3.description: Loan facility risk parameters and regulatory capital features

features.name: facility_type_encoded
features.description: Label-encoded facility type: Home Loan=0 Vehicle=1 Personal Loan=2 Credit Card=3 Overdraft=4.
features.transformation: CASE facility_type WHEN 'HL' THEN 0 WHEN 'VAF' THEN 1 WHEN 'PL' THEN 2 WHEN 'CC' THEN 3 WHEN 'OD' THEN 4 END

features.name: ltv_ratio
features.description: Loan-to-value ratio at origination. Critical for secured lending risk and SARB capital adequacy calculations.

features.name: tenure_months
features.description: Months since facility origination. Longer tenure correlates with lower default risk due to the seasoning effect.

features.name: interest_rate_margin
features.description: Margin above prime lending rate applied at origination. Reflects risk-based pricing and predicted creditworthiness.

features.name: expected_loss_band
features.description: IFRS 9 staging band based on model-predicted expected loss. Stage1=<0.5% Stage2=0.5-5% Stage3=>5%. Drives provision calculations.
features.transformation: CASE WHEN pd<0.005 THEN 'Stage1' WHEN pd<0.05 THEN 'Stage2' ELSE 'Stage3' END

details.notes:
SARB: Basel III/IV compliant calculations
Source: PostgreSQL risk ratings
Validation: Model owner sign-off required
Explainability: Feature importance tracked
Stress testing: Scenario parameters included

fv_4.name: CollateralValuationFeatures
fv_4.description: Collateral valuation and coverage metrics for secured lending

features.name: collateral_type_category
features.description: Collateral category pledged: Residential Property, Commercial Property, Vehicle, Equipment, or None.

features.name: valuation_confidence_score
features.description: AVM confidence score 0-1 for collateral value. Scores below 0.6 trigger mandatory manual valuation.

features.name: ltv_after_valuation
features.description: Updated LTV after latest AVM or physical valuation. Reflects current collateral coverage and LGD exposure.

features.name: insurance_coverage_flag
features.description: Active insurance coverage flag on the collateral asset. Affects loss given default (LGD) estimates.
features.transformation: CASE WHEN insurance_expiry>CURRENT_DATE AND policy_active=1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

features.name: revaluation_frequency_months
features.description: Months between scheduled collateral revaluations. Shorter intervals indicate higher-risk or volatile asset classes.

details.notes:
Valuation: Automated AVM + manual override
Coverage: Insurance validation
Refresh: Quarterly revaluation triggers
Source: SQL Server collateral management

fv_5.name: HistoricalTrainingFeatures
fv_5.description: Anonymized historical features for model training and bias testing

features.name: outcome_default_flag
features.description: Binary target: 1=account reached 90+dpd within 12-month observation window. Used for PD model training only, not served online.
features.transformation: CASE WHEN max_dpd_12m>=90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

features.name: application_year_quarter
features.description: Year-quarter of application (e.g. 2024Q1). Used for vintage analysis and through-the-cycle model calibration.

features.name: economic_cycle_indicator
features.description: SARB business cycle phase at origination: Expansion, Peak, Contraction, or Trough. Enables through-the-cycle stress testing.

features.name: model_version_used
features.description: MLflow run ID used to score this observation. Enables champion-challenger analysis and model governance tracking.

features.name: demographic_parity_group
features.description: Fairness monitoring group per SARB bias requirements. Non-discriminatory proxy for fairness audit only — never used as model input.

details.notes:
S3 archive: Immutable training snapshots
Anonymization: Differential privacy applied
Bias testing: Demographic parity benchmarks
POPIA: No re-identification possible
Retention: 7 years for SARB model audit

service_1.name: CreditScoringModelTraining
service_1.description: Training data service for credit scoring ML models with full governance

usedBy.name: bias-testing-pipeline
usedBy.description: Demographic parity and disparate impact testing per SARB guidelines

details.notes:
Purpose: Model development and validation
Governance: SARB Model Risk Management framework
Explainability: SHAP/LIME integration mandatory
Bias: Fairness constraints enforced
POPIA: Section 71 automated decision safeguards
Data: Anonymized training sets only
Audit: Full lineage tracking to S3 archives

service_2.name: ModelMonitoringAndDrift
service_2.description: Production model monitoring, drift detection, and bias tracking

usedBy.name: ml-ops-team
usedBy.description: Real-time model performance and drift monitoring

usedBy.name: risk-governance-committee
usedBy.description: Monthly model performance and fairness reports to SARB

details.notes:
Monitoring: Population stability index (PSI) tracking
Drift: Feature drift and concept drift detection
Bias: Ongoing demographic parity monitoring
SARB: Monthly governance reporting
POPIA: Automated decision impact assessments
Trigger: Automatic model retraining at PSI > 0.25
